Name: ANI_PEBBLE_SKITTER
VisualSummary: Palm-sized radial body on ten stilt-legs. Self-righting coin-like skitter motion.
Palette: Stone grey; pale underflesh
GameplayRead: Tiny swarm prey; comic but unsettling.

Name: ANI_GLEAM_LARVER
VisualSummary: Segmented tube-like body with reflective plates and three hook anchors. Short wet lunges.
Palette: Oil silver; pale bone; wet beige

Name: ANI_SHARDBACK_GRAZER
VisualSummary: Low-slung hexapod with overlapping ceramic back plates and tri-lobed scraping mouth.
Palette: Bone white; muted tan; dark joint tissue

Name: ANI_SILT_STRIDER
VisualSummary: Three spring legs plus stabilizer fins and buoyant belly sac for marsh travel.
Palette: Mud brown; teal sacs; pale underside

Name: ANI_PILLARBACK_HAULER
VisualSummary: Tall quadruped with stacked column vertebrae and dorsal mineral storage cavities.
Palette: Basalt black; dusty tan; faint mineral glints

Name: ANI_BASIN_TREADER
VisualSummary: Wide disc body on eight piston legs with cilia-lined underside for grazing.
Palette: Slate grey; pale cilia; muted moss staining
GameplayRead: Large herd grazer and distant silhouette anchor.

Name: ANI_NESTWEAVER_DRIFTER
VisualSummary: Soft gliding creature with four membrane fins and gas-burst sacs. Drifts between rocks.
Palette: Soft grey; cream membrane; warm belly tones

Name: ANI_MILKBLADDER_HERDLING
VisualSummary: Six-limbed crawler with visible ventral milk sac and blunt grazing face.
Palette: Tan hide; pale milk sac; reed-green staining

Name: ANI_BONE_LANTERN
VisualSummary: Floating gas bladder creature with trailing tendrils and cold blue bioluminescence.
Palette: Pale ivory; cold blue light

Name: ANI_LATCHFIN_MITE
VisualSummary: Fingernail-sized puck organism with adhesive fins. Tiny hopping suction snaps.
Palette: Dark brown; translucent fin edges

Name: ANI_CRACKRUNNER
VisualSummary: Rigid spine-wheel creature that curls into a rolling hoop. Silhouette change is its identity.
Palette: Black; rust edge highlights

Name: ANI_RIDGE_COURSER
VisualSummary: Long-bodied six-limbed runner with spring forelegs and vane tail. Reads fast at rest.
Palette: Dust tan; charcoal; pale sensory faceplate

Name: ANI_VAULTBACK_DRAY
VisualSummary: Massive load-bearing beast with dorsal vault depression and natural harness ribs.
Palette: Grey-brown; black tread skin; iron flecks

Name: ANI_TETHERBACK_PACKGRAZER
VisualSummary: Broad-backed grazer with stable dorsal anchor ridges. Calmer than the Dray.
Palette: Warm grey; tan; rope-friendly hide ridges

Name: PRD_SUTURE_WISP
VisualSummary: Tall ribbon-bodied hunter with oil-sheen and filament tail. Silhouette breaks up in motion.
Palette: Black oil sheen; violet edge light

Name: PRD_NEEDLE_MAW
VisualSummary: Buried cone organism with needle plates. Erupts upward on vibration. Reads like geology when idle.
Palette: Bone beige; black slit mouth; wet interior red

Name: PRD_DRIFT_STALKER
VisualSummary: Low sled-like body with vent vanes that skim the ground on gusts.
Palette: Dust grey; smoked glass; warm vent glow

Name: PRD_VANE_RIPPERS
VisualSummary: Knife-thin pack hunters with dorsal vanes and flat sensor faces. Aerodynamic and cooperative.
Palette: Grey-black; pale faceplate; sand-scuffed vanes

Name: PRD_GLASSJAW_CLUSTER
VisualSummary: Many small hinged jaw-pods linked by tendon cords snapping in chain reactions.
Palette: Translucent beige; pink tendon; glassy highlights

Name: PRD_SILT_HOUNDS
VisualSummary: Flat-bodied waterline ambushers with retractable stabbing limbs and breathing slits.
Palette: Mud black; teal wet sheen

Name: PRD_TRENCH_DIGGERS
VisualSummary: Segmented drill-bodied predators with rotating mineral tooth collars. Threaten base walls.
Palette: Basalt black; dirty bone teeth; iron dust

Name: PRD_CARRION_CHOIR
VisualSummary: Hovering bladder flock emitting layered subsonic calls. Power is psychological.
Palette: Pale sickly beige; cold blue sacs

Name: PRD_FOGLEECH_SWARM
VisualSummary: Thumb-sized leech flyers gathering into cloud banks. Mass reads like moving weather stain.
Palette: Grey-black; faint green biolume dots
GameplayRead: Area-control pest swarm that obscures vision and drains composure.

Name: PRD_IRONSTAG_STALKER
VisualSummary: Tall four-legged hunter with antler-like ferric blades and static-catching chest plate.
Palette: Iron red; black; silver sparks
GameplayRead: Late-mid apex predator with strong landmark silhouette.

Name: PRD_SHELLMAW_AMBUSHER
VisualSummary: Broad shell-backed beast hiding as mineral hump until opening trapdoor maw.
Palette: Mud brown; black shell; fleshy beige maw
